title: Snehithane Snehithane Lyrics Alaipayuthey
stanzas:
Snegithane snegithane
ragasiya snegithane
chinna chinnathaai
korikkaigal sevi kodu
snegithane

idhe alutham alutham
idhe anaippu anaippu
vazhvin ellai varai
vendum vendum
vazhvin ellai varai
vendum vendum..

chinna chinna
aththu meeral purivaai.
en cell ellaam pookkal
pookka cheivaai.
malargaiyil malarvaai.

poopparikkum bakthan
pola medhuvaai.
naan thoondum podhu
viral nagam kalaivaai.
saththam indri thuyilvaai

nee azhum podhu
naan azha nerndhaal
thudaikindra viral vendum.

Snegithane snegithane
ragasiya snegithane
chinna chinnathaai
korikkaigal sevi kodu
snegithane

netru mun iravil
un nithiravu maniyil
kaatru nulaivadhu pol
uyir kalandhu kalithirundhen

indru ven nilavil
andha eera ninaivil
kandu thavippadhu pol
manam kalangi
puzhambugiren.

koondhal nedivil
ezhilkuzha sarivil
garvam azhindhathadi
en garvam azhindhathadi

sonnathellaam
pagazhile puriven
sonnathellaam
pagazhile puriven
nee sollaathadhum
iravile puriven
kadhil kondu nulaippen

undhan sattai naanum potu
alaiven ne kuzhikkaiyil
naanum konjam nenaiven.
uppu mottai sumappen.

Snegithane snegithane
ragasiya snegithane
chinna chinnathaai
korikkaigal sevi kodu
snegithane

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Snehithane Snehithane expresses deep feelings of love and affection, portraying the beauty of romantic relationships.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Alaipayuthey, this song highlights the emotional connection between the lead characters, encapsulating their journey of love.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Sadhana Sargam and composed by the renowned AR Rahman.

When was the song released?

Snehithane Snehithane was released on April 14, 2000.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Snehithane Snehithane, the song encapsulates the tender emotions of love, making it a pivotal moment in Alaipayuthey. The soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke nostalgia and warmth, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. It beautifully conveys the essence of companionship and longing, making it a timeless favorite. The collaboration of Sadhana Sargam's vocals and AR Rahman's composition creates an unforgettable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Snehithane Snehithane from Alaipayuthey is a mesmerizing romantic ballad that beautifully captures the essence of love. With Sadhana Sargam's enchanting vocals and AR Rahman's magical composition, this song transports listeners to a world of emotions. Dive into the lyrical depth crafted by Vairamuthu, making it a timeless classic in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Friend, friend, secret friend, give me small wishes, friend.
This is new, new, this is a connection, connection, it should reach the end of life, it should reach the end of life..
Small, small things are understood. All my cells bloom like flowers. You are the flower in the flowers.
Like a devotee who offers flowers. When I touch, my fingers should dance. Sleep without a sound.
Take five fingers and do the service of spreading the olive.
When you cry, I should also cry, my fingers should be ready to help.
Friend, friend, secret friend, give me small wishes, friend.
Yesterday night, in your dreams, like a thread in the wind, I blended with life and fell.
Today, in this bright moonlight, my heart flows like a river, as if it has lost something.
In the curls of your hair, my pride has faded, my pride has faded.
Whatever you say, I understand it all, whatever you say, I understand it all, even what you don't say, I understand in the night, I will weave it into a thread.
I will also put on your crown, I will also think a little in your lap. I will taste the salty sweetness.
I will take you and hide in the embrace, I will hold you in my hands.
I should also do my duty and earn freedom, I will take the blessing.
Friend, friend, secret friend, give me small wishes, friend.
